title: pholidia weldii
intro: Pholidia weldii, also known as Weld or Indian Staff Plant, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of naphthoquinones, particularly weld, which has been used to treat a variety of health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Pholidia weldii include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
